title: Reset Account to initial settings
excerpt: Hi I’m new.  I’ve been experimenting with the trial version, but I am ready to subscribe.  Does the account reset to the initial settings?  Or how can I do that because I broke some of the settings while I was playing ar…

posts.author: GSWFS (Graeme Woods)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi I’m new. I’ve been experimenting with the trial version, but I am ready to subscribe. Does the account reset to the initial settings? Or how can I do that because I broke some of the settings while I was playing around.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@GSWFS,
Welcome to Monday.com! It’s great to hear that you’re ready to subscribe after trying out the trial version.
Resetting your account will erase all of your data, so be sure to back it up if you need to.

  • If you are subscribing to a paid plan, your account will be automatically upgraded to the new plan and you will be able to continue using all of your existing boards and workspaces.
  • If you are subscribing to a free plan, your account will be downgraded to the free plan and you will lose access to any features that are only available on paid plans.
  • You can always upgrade your plan later if you need to access more features or storage space

If you need any implementation support kindly contact us

MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: GSWFS (Graeme Woods)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! But how do you reset the account? Or, is it automatic when I upgrade?

posts.author: Symberian (Can Aydınlık)
posts.cookedHtml: This was one of the least useful admin comments in the history.

posts.author: PyroMike (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am in need of the very same feature.

Our company has subscribed/paid, and they are ‘playing’ with the system, adding clients, tasks, etc. We literally have no idea what we are really doing, but the team is playing with the system.

I know we need expert help, and I would like to have a ‘fresh’ system for when outsourced help comes in to set up and deploy a system, and show us ‘best practices’, training, etc.

Is there a feature where we can ‘factory reset’ Monday.com to the original purchased system?
